subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who hath arisen and shone forth from the horizon of Divine Unity with intense radiance and glorious manifestation, through Whose revelation all things were unveiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن اشرق و لاح من افق التوحید بسطوع شدید و ظهور مجید و تجلی انکشفت به
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement
